title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Razorpay

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Razorpay
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
